title: EPA v. NORTH HEMPSTEAD, TOWN OF
text:
EPA Enforcement Case 02-1975-0006: NORTH HEMPSTEAD, TOWN OF
Type: Civil Judicial Action
Status: Closed
Outcome: Litigated No Penalty
Lead Agency: EPA

Laws and Sections Violated:
  CAA: 110: Implementation Plan for National Primary and Secondary Ambient Air Quality Standards (State Implementation Plan for National Primary and Secondary Ambient Air Quality Standards)

Defendants:
  NORTH HEMPSTEAD, TOWN OF

Facilities:
  NORTH HEMPSTEAD, TOWN, 220 PLANDOME ROAD, MANHASSET, NY

Case Milestones:
  12/12/1975: Referred To Headquarters
  01/03/1976: Referred To Dept Of Justice
  01/21/1976: Referred TO U.S. Attorney
  02/19/1976: Complaint Filed With Court
  07/07/1978: Concluded
  07/07/1978: Enforcement Action Closed

Pollutants:
  PM PARTICULATES

Violations:
Violation Of A SIP  Not Otherwise Specified
